# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on self-hosted runners in our datacenter. The workflow executes custom build scripts and deployment commands provided by developers. This gives our team flexibility to run any build process they need on our infrastructure.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build and Deployment Workflow
on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build-and-deploy:
    runs-on: self-hosted
    strategy:
      matrix:
        os: [ubuntu-latest, windows-latest]
        architecture: [x64, arm64]

    steps:
    - name: Checkout code
      uses: actions/checkout@v2

    - name: Set up environment
      run: |
        # Add any necessary environment variables or setup commands here

    - name: Run custom build scripts
      run: |
        # Developers can provide their own build scripts in this section
        # Example: sh ./build.sh

    - name: Deploy application
      run: |
        # Developers can provide their own deployment commands in this section
        # Example: sh ./deploy.sh
